observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
line = \"const 'const' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/004_const_var_defn.sysu.c:2:1>\"
print('Line:', repr(line))
print('Space pos:', line.find(' '))
type_str = line[0:line.find(' ')]
print('Type:', repr(type_str))
print('In kClangTokens:', type_str == 'const')
